title: Loot Pigs
body:
# Loot Pigs 
Now pigs have little chance to spawn with barrels on top of them. Destroy them faster and get some nice starter resources! They also can appear while breading normal pigs.
Also you can this command and summon lootpigs by yourself
```
/function ts_lootpig:summonlootpig
```
<video controls src="https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/784744313790791690/1011283128549118012/8mb.video-285-w2OFwAc9.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
